title: AgentRule
description: Single rule/playbook .md: role, description, prerequisites, body (playbook content), optional input/output

name.description: Slug for the filename, e.g. 'timing' or 'subtitles' (without .md)

description.description: Short description of what this rule covers (used in frontmatter)

role.description: Optional: what is the role of this .md (when to load it, what it governs)

prerequisites.description: Optional list of prerequisites (e.g. other rules to read first, concepts to know)

body.description: Main markdown content: sections (##), code blocks, lists, steps. The playbook/rules content.

input.description: Optional: when the rule has inputs (e.g. expected format, parameters)

output.description: Optional: when the rule has outputs (e.g. what it produces, return format)
